name: Unstructured API
what_it_does: Parses and preprocesses unstructured documents (PDFs, Word, PowerPoint, HTML, images) into clean, structured text chunks optimized for LLM and RAG pipelines.
use_cases: Ingesting enterprise documents into RAG knowledge bases
Extracting structured content from PDF reports and contracts
Pre-processing mixed document types for LLM fine-tuning datasets
Converting scanned images and presentations into text for search indexing
Building document intelligence pipelines with automatic table and figure extraction
not_for: Real-time document processing at very low latency requirements
best_when: Building RAG pipelines that ingest heterogeneous document types (PDFs, DOCX, PPTX, HTML) and need chunking strategies aligned with LLM context windows
avoid_when: Documents are already structured (JSON, CSV, plain text) or when processing speed is critical and document complexity is low

auth.notes: Single API key passed via unstructured-api-key header; separate keys for free and paid tiers

pricing.free_tier_limits: 1,000 pages/month on hosted API; open source library is free and self-hostable
pricing.paid_tiers: Pay-as-you-go from $10/month; enterprise plans available with volume discounts
pricing.notes: Open source core (Apache 2.0) can be self-hosted for free; hosted API adds hi-res OCR and table extraction

performance.rate_limits: Varies by plan; free tier throttled; paid tiers support concurrent requests

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Errors include HTTP status codes and descriptive messages; edge cases around unsupported file types sometimes produce generic failures
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Stateless API — same file submitted multiple times returns same output; no server-side state
known_agent_gotchas: Large PDFs (100+ pages) can hit timeout limits on free tier — consider chunking input files
hi_res strategy significantly increases latency; default fast strategy recommended for most agent workflows
Output element order may vary slightly between API versions — pin strategy and version for reproducibility
Multipart form upload required (not JSON body) — some HTTP clients need explicit configuration
OCR quality degrades on low-resolution scanned images; pre-process images above 150 DPI

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced; single API key with no scope granularity; documents sent to hosted API — consider self-hosting for sensitive data
